title: Words For Wednesday: Love Has No Labels

content:
Words For Wednesday: Love Has No Labels

In light of last Friday’s wonderful news, today’s words are about love!

Love knows no gender, no age, no race. Love has no labels.

Everyone deserves love, plain and simple. #LoveWins #MarriageEquality

Hope your Wednesday is a great one! 🙂
